zh.Chirk, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom: 英國威爾斯萊可哈姆可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch於1122年出生在英國威爾斯萊可哈姆可時，他的父親Gronwy ap Tudur32歲，母親Mrs William de Metz38歲。他和Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.Chirk, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom: 英国威尔斯萊可哈姆可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch于1122年出生在英国威尔斯萊可哈姆可时，他的父亲Gronwy ap Tudur32岁，母亲Mrs William de Metz38岁。他和Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Lord
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English laford, louerd, lord ‘lord, master’ (Old English hlāford), perhaps given to a someone who played the part of the lord or master of ceremonies in festival games.
Irish: adoption of the English name (see 1 above) as a translation of the main element of Gaelic Ó Tighearnaigh (see Tierney ) and Mac Thighearnáin (see McKiernan ).
Americanized form of French Laure, a variant of the personal name Laur 3.

variants.name: Tierney
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, John Patrick, Brigid, Clodagh, Kieran, Michael Sean, Siobhan.

Irish: shortened form of O'Tierney, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tíghearnaigh ‘descendant of Tighearnach’, a byname meaning ‘lord, master’. The Gaelic name is sometimes ‘translated’ as English Lord . Compare Tiernan .

variants.name: Lords
meanings: English: variant of Lord , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Lonas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of Jonah , from the New Testament Greek form of the name. Both Jonah and Jonas were used by the Puritans, the latter from the 1560s at least.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Gronwy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name of uncertain derivation, borne in the Mabinogi by Goronwy the Staunch , Lord of Penllyn. He became the lover of the flower-maiden Blodeuedd and murdered her husband Lleu Llaw Gyffes , but Lleu was later restored to life and definitively dispatched Goronwy.

en.lifeSummary: When Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch was born in 1122, in Chirk, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Gronwy ap Tudur, was 32 and his mother, Mrs William de Metz, was 38. He had at least 1 son with Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch est né en 1122, à Chirk, Wrexham, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Gronwy ap Tudur, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Mrs William de Metz, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch 1122 in Chirk, Wrexham, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gronwy ap Tudur 32 und seine Mutter Mrs William de Metz 38. Er hatte mit Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch è nato il nel 1122 nel Chirk, Wrexham, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Gronwy ap Tudur, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Mrs William de Metz, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin.

ja.lifeSummary: Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerchが1122年にイギリスウェールズウレクスハムチルクで生まれた時，父Gronwy ap Tudurは32歳，母Mrs William de Metzは38歳であった。彼はGwladys Gronwy verch Jenkinとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch(이)가 1122년 영국 웨일스 레스함 치르크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gronwy ap Tudur(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William de Metz(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch родился в 1122 г. в местности чирк, рексхам, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Gronwy ap Tudur было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs William de Metz, 38. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lonas ap Gronwy Lord of Llanerch nació en 1122, en Chirk, Wrexham, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Gronwy ap Tudur, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Mrs William de Metz, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Gwladys Gronwy verch Jenkin.
